requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — General Luminaire (BSMD / GSO IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——通用灯具（BSMD / GSO IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——通用燈具（BSMD / GSO IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Bahrain market must satisfy the electrical-safety requirements enforced by BSMD (Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate) under MOIC. The Gulf region adopts IEC luminaire safety as GSO standards — GSO IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests) plus the relevant Part 2 sections for the specific luminaire type. Requirements cover protection against electric shock (creepage and clearance, insulation resistance, touch current), thermal endurance, mechanical strength, and terminal/wiring construction. Conformity is demonstrated to BSMD through an in-country importer; a test report from an accredited (ILAC MRA) laboratory against the GSO/IEC luminaire standard is the usual evidence. Products must be rated for the Bahrain supply of 230 V, 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 在巴林市场销售的 LED 灯具须满足工商部（MOIC）下属巴林标准与计量局（BSMD）执行的电气安全要求。海湾地区将 IEC 灯具安全标准采纳为 GSO 标准——GSO IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验）及对应具体灯具类型的相关第 2 部分。要求涵盖防触电（爬电距离与电气间隙、绝缘电阻、接触电流）、热耐久性、机械强度及端子/接线结构。合格评定通过当地进口商向 BSMD 提交；由认可（ILAC MRA）实验室出具的、按 GSO/IEC 灯具标准的检测报告为通常证据。产品须按巴林 230 V、50 Hz 电源额定。
summary.zht: 在巴林市場銷售的 LED 燈具須滿足工商部（MOIC）下屬巴林標準與計量局（BSMD）執行的電氣安全要求。海灣地區將 IEC 燈具安全標準採納為 GSO 標準——GSO IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗）及對應具體燈具類型的相關第 2 部分。要求涵蓋防觸電（爬電距離與電氣間隙、絕緣電阻、接觸電流）、熱耐久性、機械強度及端子/接線結構。合格評定通過當地進口商向 BSMD 提交；由認可（ILAC MRA）實驗室出具的、按 GSO/IEC 燈具標準的檢測報告為通常證據。產品須按巴林 230 V、50 Hz 電源額定。

standards_or_laws: BSMD (Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate, MOIC) — conformity/registration for regulated electrical products
GSO IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (GSO adoption of IEC 60598-1)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026. The edition change moved the designation from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T; CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires remain governed by applicable CNCA rules rather than by the GB/T designation alone. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) testing is conducted by CNCA-authorized laboratories. The CCC pathway and Chinese test reports are not recognised for Bahrain BSMD market access.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015。此次换版将标准属性由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T；范围内灯具的 CCC 义务仍由适用的 CNCA 规则决定，而非仅由 GB/T 标识决定。CCC（中国强制性产品认证）检测由 CNCA 授权实验室进行。CCC 路径及中国检测报告不被巴林 BSMD 市场准入所认可。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015。此次換版將標準屬性由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T；範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務仍由適用的 CNCA 規則決定，而非僅由 GB/T 標識決定。CCC（中國強制性產品認證）檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室進行。CCC 路徑及中國檢測報告不被巴林 BSMD 市場准入所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; recommended GB/T designation)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both GSO IEC 60598-1 (Bahrain) and GB 7000.1 (China) derive from the same IEC 60598-1 base, so the core technical content is largely harmonized. Key gaps for the exporter: (1) the conformity route differs — Bahrain requires registration/conformity through BSMD via an in-country importer, whereas China uses CCC third-party certification; the two are not mutually recognised, so a separate Bahrain conformity file is required; (2) the product must be rated and tested for 230 V, 50 Hz (Bahrain nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V, even though both are 50 Hz) — verify component ratings, creepage/clearance and dielectric margins at 230 V; (3) test evidence should come from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory against the GSO/IEC edition accepted by BSMD; existing CN CCC reports cannot be reused directly. Confirm the exact GSO IEC 60598 edition and any Gulf national deviations currently accepted by BSMD.
gap.zh: 巴林 GSO IEC 60598-1 与中国 GB 7000.1 均源自同一 IEC 60598-1 基础，核心技术内容基本协调。出口商的主要差距：（1）合格评定路径不同——巴林须经当地进口商通过 BSMD 进行注册/合格评定，中国则采用 CCC 第三方认证；两者不互认，故须单独准备巴林合格评定文件；（2）产品须按 230 V、50 Hz 额定并检测（巴林标称电压与中国 220 V 不同，尽管同为 50 Hz）——须核查零部件额定值及 230 V 下的爬电距离/电气间隙与介电裕度；（3）检测证据应来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室，按 BSMD 接受的 GSO/IEC 版本出具；现有中国 CCC 报告不可直接复用。请确认 BSMD 当前接受的具体 GSO IEC 60598 版本及任何海湾国家偏差。
gap.zht: 巴林 GSO IEC 60598-1 與中國 GB 7000.1 均源自同一 IEC 60598-1 基礎，核心技術內容基本協調。出口商的主要差距：（1）合格評定路徑不同——巴林須經當地進口商通過 BSMD 進行注冊/合格評定，中國則採用 CCC 第三方認證；兩者不互認，故須單獨準備巴林合格評定文件；（2）產品須按 230 V、50 Hz 額定並檢測（巴林標稱電壓與中國 220 V 不同，儘管同為 50 Hz）——須核查零部件額定值及 230 V 下的爬電距離/電氣間隙與介電裕度；（3）檢測證據應來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室，按 BSMD 接受的 GSO/IEC 版本出具；現有中國 CCC 報告不可直接複用。請確認 BSMD 當前接受的具體 GSO IEC 60598 版本及任何海灣國家偏差。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — luminaire electrical safety conformity to GSO IEC 60598-1 required for BSMD market access in Bahrain; registration via in-country importer
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire remains within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) — Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaire electrical safety for Bahrain is assessed against GSO IEC 60598-1 (GSO adoption of the IEC luminaire standard) and enforced by BSMD under MOIC, with conformity handled through an in-country importer. The technical content is largely harmonized with China's GB 7000.1, but the conformity routes are non-mutual and the product must be rated and tested for 230 V, 50 Hz. Chinese CCC certification does not satisfy the Bahrain pathway. Confirm the exact GSO/IEC edition and any Gulf deviations accepted by BSMD before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林 LED 灯具电气安全按 GSO IEC 60598-1（GSO 采纳的 IEC 灯具标准）评估，由 MOIC 下属 BSMD 执行，合格评定通过当地进口商办理。技术内容与中国 GB 7000.1 基本协调，但合格评定路径不互认，且产品须按 230 V、50 Hz 额定并检测。中国 CCC 认证不满足巴林路径。提交前请确认 BSMD 接受的具体 GSO/IEC 版本及任何海湾偏差。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林 LED 燈具電氣安全按 GSO IEC 60598-1（GSO 採納的 IEC 燈具標準）評估，由 MOIC 下屬 BSMD 執行，合格評定通過當地進口商辦理。技術內容與中國 GB 7000.1 基本協調，但合格評定路徑不互認，且產品須按 230 V、50 Hz 額定並檢測。中國 CCC 認證不滿足巴林路徑。提交前請確認 BSMD 接受的具體 GSO/IEC 版本及任何海灣偏差。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp + Driver / Control Gear Safety (GSO IEC 62560 / GSO IEC 61347-2-13)
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯 + 驱动器 / 控制装置安全（GSO IEC 62560 / GSO IEC 61347-2-13）
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈 + 驅動器 / 控制裝置安全（GSO IEC 62560 / GSO IEC 61347-2-13）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (retrofit bulbs) for Bahrain are assessed against GSO IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — safety specifications), while separate LED drivers/control gear are assessed against the GSO adoption of IEC 61347-2-13 (particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic control gear for LED modules). These cover insulation/isolation class, dielectric strength, thermal endurance, and safety marking, evaluated at the Bahrain supply of 230 V, 50 Hz. Where a driver is sold as a standalone product it requires its own conformity evidence; where it is integrated, its safety data forms part of the luminaire/lamp file. BSMD conformity is arranged through an in-country importer, normally supported by an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory report.
summary.zh: 面向巴林的自镇流 LED 灯（替换型灯泡）按 GSO IEC 62560（普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）评估，独立 LED 驱动器/控制装置按 GSO 采纳的 IEC 61347-2-13（直流或交流供电的 LED 模块用电子控制装置的特殊要求）评估。其涵盖绝缘/隔离等级、介电强度、热耐久性及安全标志，并在巴林 230 V、50 Hz 电源下评估。若驱动器作为独立产品销售，须具备其自身的合格评定证据；若为集成式，其安全数据并入灯具/灯的文件。BSMD 合格评定通过当地进口商办理，通常以 ILAC MRA 认可实验室报告作为支撑。
summary.zht: 面向巴林的自鎮流 LED 燈（替換型燈泡）按 GSO IEC 62560（普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）評估，獨立 LED 驅動器/控制裝置按 GSO 採納的 IEC 61347-2-13（直流或交流供電的 LED 模組用電子控制裝置的特殊要求）評估。其涵蓋絕緣/隔離等級、介電強度、熱耐久性及安全標誌，並在巴林 230 V、50 Hz 電源下評估。若驅動器作為獨立產品銷售，須具備其自身的合格評定證據；若為集成式，其安全數據並入燈具/燈的文件。BSMD 合格評定通過當地進口商辦理，通常以 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室報告作為支撐。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications (GSO adoption)
GSO IEC 61347-2-13 — Lamp controlgear — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (GSO adoption)

summary.en: China's equivalents are GB 24906-2010 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications, aligned with IEC 62560) for retrofit LED lamps, and GB 19510.14-2014 (Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13, aligned with IEC 61347-2-13) for LED drivers. CCC certification may be required for self-ballasted LED lamps and for LED drivers in certain power ranges sold in the Chinese residential market. Chinese CCC test reports under these GB standards are not accepted for Bahrain BSMD market access.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用 50V 以上自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求，与 IEC 62560 对齐）用于替换型 LED 灯，以及 GB 19510.14-2014（灯的控制装置——第 2-13 部分，与 IEC 61347-2-13 对齐）用于 LED 驱动器。在中国居民市场，自镇流 LED 灯及特定功率范围内的 LED 驱动器可能须取得 CCC 认证。这些 GB 标准下的中国 CCC 检测报告不被巴林 BSMD 市场准入所接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用 50V 以上自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求，與 IEC 62560 對齊）用於替換型 LED 燈，以及 GB 19510.14-2014（燈的控制裝置——第 2-13 部分，與 IEC 61347-2-13 對齊）用於 LED 驅動器。在中國居民市場，自鎮流 LED 燈及特定功率範圍內的 LED 驅動器可能須取得 CCC 認證。這些 GB 標準下的中國 CCC 檢測報告不被巴林 BSMD 市場准入所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services > 50 V — Safety specifications (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Part 2-13: Particular requirements for DC or AC supplied electronic controlgear for LED modules (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: The GSO and GB standards for self-ballasted LED lamps and LED drivers share the same IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 base, so technical content is largely harmonized. Key gaps: (1) conformity is non-mutual — Bahrain requires BSMD conformity via an in-country importer, separate from China's CCC; (2) products and components must be rated for 230 V, 50 Hz (Bahrain nominal voltage differs from China's 220 V), so verify dielectric and isolation margins at the higher voltage; (3) a standalone driver needs its own conformity file; an integrated driver's safety data forms part of the lamp/luminaire file; (4) the exporter should confirm the specific GSO IEC editions currently accepted by BSMD and whether a Gulf conformity mark or registration certificate is required at import/clearance (Khalifa Bin Salman Port).
gap.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯与 LED 驱动器的 GSO 与 GB 标准同以 IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 为基础，技术内容基本协调。主要差距：（1）合格评定不互认——巴林须经当地进口商通过 BSMD 办理，与中国 CCC 分立；（2）产品及零部件须按 230 V、50 Hz 额定（巴林标称电压与中国 220 V 不同），故须核查较高电压下的介电及隔离裕度；（3）独立驱动器须具备其自身合格评定文件；集成式驱动器的安全数据并入灯/灯具文件；（4）出口商应确认 BSMD 当前接受的具体 GSO IEC 版本，以及进口/清关（哈利法·本·萨勒曼港）时是否需要海湾合格标志或注册证书。
gap.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈與 LED 驅動器的 GSO 與 GB 標準同以 IEC 62560 / IEC 61347-2-13 為基礎，技術內容基本協調。主要差距：（1）合格評定不互認——巴林須經當地進口商通過 BSMD 辦理，與中國 CCC 分立；（2）產品及零部件須按 230 V、50 Hz 額定（巴林標稱電壓與中國 220 V 不同），故須核查較高電壓下的介電及隔離裕度；（3）獨立驅動器須具備其自身合格評定文件；集成式驅動器的安全數據並入燈/燈具文件；（4）出口商應確認 BSMD 當前接受的具體 GSO IEC 版本，以及進口/清關（哈利法·本·薩勒曼港）時是否需要海灣合格標誌或注冊證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — self-ballasted LED lamp safety to GSO IEC 62560 and LED driver safety to GSO IEC 61347-2-13 required for BSMD market access; standalone drivers need own conformity evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (scope/power-range dependent) — CCC may be required for self-ballasted LED lamps (GB 24906) and LED drivers (GB 19510.14) under CNCA-C10-01

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — adopted by Bahrain via BSMD/MOIC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps for Bahrain are assessed to GSO IEC 62560 and LED drivers to GSO IEC 61347-2-13, enforced by BSMD under MOIC via an in-country importer. The standards are largely harmonized with China's GB 24906 and GB 19510.14, but the conformity routes are non-mutual and components must be rated for 230 V, 50 Hz. Chinese CCC evidence does not satisfy the Bahrain pathway; confirm the accepted GSO/IEC editions with BSMD before submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林自镇流 LED 灯按 GSO IEC 62560 评估，LED 驱动器按 GSO IEC 61347-2-13 评估，由 MOIC 下属 BSMD 经当地进口商执行。上述标准与中国 GB 24906 及 GB 19510.14 基本协调，但合格评定路径不互认，且零部件须按 230 V、50 Hz 额定。中国 CCC 证据不满足巴林路径；提交前请向 BSMD 确认接受的 GSO/IEC 版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林自鎮流 LED 燈按 GSO IEC 62560 評估，LED 驅動器按 GSO IEC 61347-2-13 評估，由 MOIC 下屬 BSMD 經當地進口商執行。上述標準與中國 GB 24906 及 GB 19510.14 基本協調，但合格評定路徑不互認，且零部件須按 230 V、50 Hz 額定。中國 CCC 證據不滿足巴林路徑；提交前請向 BSMD 確認接受的 GSO/IEC 版本。
